tools.name: todo_read
tools.description: Read the current scratch-pad todo list for this pagelet session. Returns an array of {id, text, done, createdAt} items.

tools.name: todo_write
tools.description: Append, update, or remove items on the scratch-pad todo list. Use op = 'add' to append, 'toggle' to flip done, 'remove' to delete by id, 'clear' to wipe.
